en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Turkey Statutory Labor Insurance documentation in the Turkey Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

The Insurance Registry Certificate/Workplace Registration certifies that your business is registered with the Social Security Institution (SGK). This letter can be requested directly from local SGK offices or accessed through the SGK’s e-Government (e-Devlet) online portal .
Please upload a valid Insurance Registry Certificate/Workplace Registration from the Social Security Institution (SGK) confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.

The “No Insurance Debt” Letter is the official document certifying that your company has no outstanding social security premium debts. This letter is accessible online via the SKG website , or can be requested in person at your local SGK branch.
Please upload a valid “No Insurance Debt” Letter confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.
